prompt: Add profile_summary(profile) formatted as '<display name> <normalized email> [active|inactive]'. Reuse display_name, add tests for both states, and run them.

argv: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'src'); from profiles import profile_summary; p={'first_name':'Ada','last_name':'Lovelace','email':' ADA@EXAMPLE.COM ','active':True}; assert profile_summary(p) == 'Ada Lovelace <ada@example.com> [active]'; p['active']=False; assert profile_summary(p) == 'Ada Lovelace <ada@example.com> [inactive]'
